versions.version_description: Acoustic Guitar gentle strum open chords or simple pluck as per chord guide at top of tab.Try Capo at 1 Starting A to make chords easier to find.
Chords well suited for piano/keys, bass notes included. Based on YouTube Link: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lTQtBtafCMg.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: Dont Take Your Guns To Town

content:
CAPO ON FIRST FRET!!!
  ---------------------

[Intro]

[tab]    [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]A5[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]A5[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]A5[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]
    One more night,               one more night[/tab]

[Verse]
[tab]  [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]Em[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]
    I've been trying ooh so long to let you know[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]Em[/ch]
    Let you know how I feel[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
    And if I stumble if I fall, just help me back[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]Em[/ch]
    So I can make you see[/tab]
  
[Chorus]
[tab]                   [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]A5[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]
    Please give me one more night, give me one more night[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
    One more night cos I can't wait forever[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]A5[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]
    Give me just one more night, oh just one more night[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
    Oh one more night cos I can't wait forever[/tab]
  
[Verse]
[tab]  [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]               [ch]Em[/ch]     
    I've been sitting here so long[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]Em[/ch]
    Wasting time, just staring at the phone[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]                    [ch]Em[/ch]       
    And I was wondering should I call you[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]Em[/ch]
    Then I thought maybe you're not alone[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]                   [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]A5[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]
    Please give me one more night, give me one more night[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
    One more night cos I can't wait forever[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]A5[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]
    Give me just one more night, oh just one more night[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
    Oh one more night cos I can't wait forever[/tab]
  
[tab]  [ch]Bm7[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]
      Like a river to the sea[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Bm7[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]
      I will always be with you[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Bm7[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]
      And if you sail away[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Bm7[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]
      I will follow you[/tab]
    

[Chorus]
[tab]            [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]A5[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]
    Give me one more night, give me one more night[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
    One more night cos I can't wait forever[/tab]

[Verse]
[tab]  [ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]Em[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]
    I know there'll never be a time you'll ever feel the same[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]Em[/ch]
    And I know it's only words[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]               [ch]Em[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]
    But if you change your mind  you know that I'll be here[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]Em[/ch]
    And maybe we both can learn[/tab]
  

[Chorus]
[tab]                 [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]                   [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]A5[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]
    Give me just one more night, give me just one more night[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]    
    Ooh one more night, cos I can't wait forever[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]                   [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]A5[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]    
    Give me just one more night, give me just one more night[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]    
    Ooh one more night, cos I can't wait forever[/tab]

[Outro]
